description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Market Cap Fee Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.5.2.3.2.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](6548ed03-6cf2-482e-ab15-0d39f5c2f767), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.5.2.3.2.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](79d81288-94aa-44e9-85d2-2f5108b5d789).
